task_objective: Fix Nullity Matrix transposition and populate Job Duration in report.
design_decisions: Added 'duration' to report.analysis in Python to capture the full profiling lifecycle.
Implemented client-side transposition in the NullityMatrix React component to handle Ibis's column-oriented matrix output.
Enhanced Job Duration UI to show seconds for longer runs and ms for shorter ones.
results: Nullity Matrix now correctly displays 250 rows vertically instead of being horizontally stretched. Job Duration in the sidebar correctly reflects the actual time taken by the profiling process.
